overview.description: AI market research platform using neuro-symbolic AI to simulate survey respondents at scale
overview.description_long: Lakmoos AI builds AI panels and autonomous agents for market research, combining proprietary neuro-symbolic AI with behavioral science to simulate how customers think, feel, and behave. Their platform lets enterprises run unlimited surveys overnight at 10x lower cost than traditional panels, with 98%+ accuracy validated against real human data. Used by Volkswagen Group, Skoda, Raiffeisenbank, and Mattoni.

history.origin_story: Founded by a Czech team blending AI and behavioural science to make market research affordable and instant. HQ in Brno, Czech Republic.

key_milestones.event: Clients ran over 500 surveys and 5,000 interviews in a single year
AI respondents answering 20M+ questions per week; 50+ enterprise clients; 98% accuracy across 20 benchmarking studies

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Lakmoos uses proprietary neuro-symbolic AI (not LLM wrappers) validated with 98% accuracy across 20+ benchmarking studies, giving them a data and methodology moat. However, foundation models are rapidly improving at behavioral simulation, and general-purpose AI could challenge the core survey-simulation use case over time.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Market research is a large, established ~$87B global industry with clear demand for faster and cheaper insights. Lakmoos has real enterprise clients (Volkswagen, Raiffeisenbank, Skoda) and proven ROI metrics (14% improvement in Raiffeisenbank in-app relevance, 90% cost savings at Skoda).
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding found; 20-person team likely bootstrapped or pre-seed. While they appear to have paying enterprise clients (€4k/month subscriptions, €10k pilots), there are no runway signals or investor backing to confirm financial stability.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A proprietary neuro-symbolic tech stack and validated accuracy give Lakmoos a real moat in the market research AI space, and a growing roster of enterprise clients reduces market risk. However, absence of disclosed funding raises execution risk for a small 20-person team competing in an increasingly crowded synthetic data/AI research market.

metadata.notes: Company is headquartered in Brno (not Prague), but is listed in CNAIP (Czech national AI catalog). CEO first name is Kamila, CTO first name is Jan — surnames not found on public pages. The form placeholder 'Kamil Polišenský' may be a co-founder or team lead.
